hyper-sills-skills.description: HYPER-SILLs Skills Registry -- search, filter, recommend skills from the 23KB registry

hyper-sills-ps.description: HYPER-SILLs PowerShell tools -- PSAI-registered skill search and recommendation agents

hypercode-gateway.description: HyperCode V2.4 MCP Gateway -- cross-link skills to the agent stack

broski-brain-mcp.description: BROski Brain -- pull focus + session context alongside skill recommendations

aish.systemPromptAddition: You have access to the HYPER-SILLs skills registry. When a user asks what to learn, what skill they need, or how to solve a problem -- call recommend_skills_for_task first. Always match skill recommendations to the user's current task and energy level. Neurodivergent-first: one skill at a time, clear wins, no overwhelm.
